parameters.query:
SELECT param5 AS ad_id, COUNT(*) AS total_leads,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS depositors,
       ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN cost ELSE 0 END), 2) AS crm_revenue
FROM leads
WHERE param5 IS NOT NULL AND param5 != '' AND param5 REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'
  AND created_at >= CURDATE()
GROUP BY param5

INSERT INTO daily_pnl (date, total_spend, total_revenue, gross_profit, roi_percent, balance_end)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.date }}',
  {{ $json.total_spend }},
  {{ $json.total_revenue }},
  {{ $json.total_profit }},
  {{ $json.total_roi }},
  {{ $json.balance }}
)
ON CONFLICT (date) DO UPDATE SET
  total_spend = EXCLUDED.total_spend,
  total_revenue = EXCLUDED.total_revenue,
  gross_profit = EXCLUDED.gross_profit,
  roi_percent = EXCLUDED.roi_percent,
  balance_end = EXCLUDED.balance_end;
